command:
uv run python -u -c 
import urllib.request
import urllib.error

headers = {
    'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36',
    'Accept': 'text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/webp,*/*;q=0.8',
    'Accept-Language': 'en-GB,en;q=0.9',
}

urls = [
    'https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2211124725016055',
    'https://www.cell.com/cell-reports/fulltext/S2211-1247(25)01605-5',
]
for u in urls:
    req = urllib.request.Request(u, headers=headers)
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp:
            data = resp.read()
            ct = resp.headers.get('Content-Type', '')
            print(u, '->', len(data), ct)
            # look for pdf link candidates
            s = data.decode('utf-8', errors='ignore')
            import re
            for m in re.finditer(r'(https?://[^"\' ]{0,200}\.pdf[^"\' ]{0,200})', s):
                print('  PDF-like:', m.group(1)[:200])
            # also look for common patterns
            for pat in ['pdfft', 'showPdf', 'linkinghub', 'S2211-1247', 'aws.amazon', 'pdf']:
                count = s.count(pat)
                if count:
                    print(f'  pat {pat!r}: {count}')
            print('  title:', re.search(r'<title>(.*?)</title>', s, re.S).group(1)[:200] if re.search(r'<title>(.*?)</title>', s, re.S) else 'no title')
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        print(u, 'HTTP', e.code, e.reason)
    except Exception as e:
        print(u, 'ERROR', repr(e))
